manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a book, a potion recipe, a pillow, a wardrobe and a bed. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The pillow is on the floor. The wardrobe is closed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
> take potion recipe
You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
> read potion recipe

You read the potion recipe:
Floorboard potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, eye of newt, peach, spider egg.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Add the peach into your cauldron.
3. Wiggle a zulpowand over your cauldron.
4. Use a fairy wand over your cauldron.
5. Add the eye of newt into your cauldron.
6. Put the spider egg into your cauldron.
> take book
You take the book. In your inventory you have a book and a potion recipe.
> open wardrobe
The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
> go to reading room
You are in a reading room now. There are a side table, a shelf, a couch, a table and a chair. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
> examine shelf
This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
> examine side table
This is a side table. There is nothing on the side table.
> examine couch
This is a couch. There is nothing on the couch.
> examine table
This is a table. There is nothing on the table.
> go to garden

You are in a garden now. There are a lily of the valley, a nightshade, a bucket of water and a garden bench. The lily of the valley is on the floor. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
> examine bucket of water
This is a bucket of water. The bucket of water is takeable. The bucket of water is on. The bucket of water is on the floor.
> go to storage room

You are in a storage room now. There are a crate, a plonkle crystal, a ladle, a plunkle crystal, a spoon, a whisk, a borpulus and a plinkle crystal. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. The whisk is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
> examine crate
This is a crate. There is nothing on the crate.
> go to cellar

You are in a cellar now. There are a bucket of ectoplasm, a spider, a red beetle, a spiderweb, a green beetle and a spider egg. The bucket of ectoplasm is on the floor. The spider is on the floor. The red beetle is on the floor. The spiderweb is on the floor. The green beetle is on the floor. The spider egg is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
> drop book
You drop the book on the floor.
> take bucket of ectoplasm
You take the bucket of ectoplasm. In your inventory you have a bucket of ectoplasm and a potion recipe.
> take spider egg
Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
> go to hallway
You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a magic workshop, a broom closet, a reading room and a bedroom here.
> go to magic workshop

You are in a magic workshop now. There are a orrery, a fairy wand, a ice wand, a fire wand, a zulpowand and a workbench. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
> take zulpowand
Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
> go to kitchen

You are in a kitchen now. There are a counter, a cauldron, a cupboard and a plate. The cauldron is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. The plate is on the floor. There are passages to a pantry and a conservatory here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> pour bucket of ectoplasm into cauldron
You pour the contents of bucket of ectoplasm into the cauldron. The bucket of ectoplasm instantly refills itself.
> go to pantry

You are in a pantry now. There are a apple, a banana, a toad, a sandwich, a ice box, a orange, a peach, a ingredient rack and a eye of newt. The apple is in the ice box. The banana is in the ice box. The toad is in the ice box. The sandwich is in the ice box. The ice box is closed. The orange is in the ice box. The peach is in the ice box. The eye of newt is on the floor. There is a passage to a kitchen here.
> drop bucket of ectoplasm
You drop the bucket of ectoplasm on the floor.
> take eye of newt
You take the eye of newt. In your inventory you have a potion recipe and a eye of newt.
> open ice box
The ice box is now open. In the ice box there are a toad, a sandwich, a apple, a banana, a orange and a peach.
> drop potion recipe
You drop the potion recipe on the floor.
> take peach
You take the peach. In your inventory you have a peach and a eye of newt.
> go to kitchen

You are in a kitchen now. There are a counter, a cauldron, a ectoplasm, a cupboard and a plate. The cauldron is on the floor. The ectoplasm is in the cauldron. The cupboard is closed. The plate is on the floor. There are passages to a pantry and a conservatory here.
> put peach in cauldron

You put the peach in the cauldron.
The peach combines with the ectoplasm with a swirling pattern creating a liquid in the cauldron.
> go to magic workshop
You can't go to a magic workshop from here.
> go to conservatory
You are in a conservatory now. There are a prickly pear and a planting table. The prickly pear is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
> go to hallway
You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a magic workshop, a broom closet, a reading room and a bedroom here.
> go to magic workshop

You are in a magic workshop now. There are a orrery, a fairy wand, a ice wand, a fire wand, a zulpowand and a workbench. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
